title: 🔎 MEGA AUDIT v2 (READ-ONLY) — Wiring + Perf + Dead-code + Guardrails (universal)
summary: MEGA AUDIT v2 complete. Final report saved to MEGA_AUDIT_V2.md. Key findings: Wiring 10/10 actions wired; Guardrails - async blocking (3 files), eager imports (critical); Perf/Memory - 4.5s+ import time, 44 MLX files lack cache clearing, only 6 to_thread for 192 async; Dead code - 25 TODOs, 4 backup files (~3MB), 16 orphan handlers; Test gaps - 8+ untested modules, M1-specific branches.
